title: Diekirch, Diekirch Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Diekirch, Diekirch Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Diekirch is a city in Diekirch Canton with a population of 7,200. A historic town in northern Luxembourg famous for its brewery, the National Museum of Military History, and its picturesque old town along the Sauer River.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
